tags.name: fab-menu-item
tags.description:
An action item within a `fab-menu`.
---


### **Methods:**
 - **focus(options: _FocusOptions_)** - Focuses the underlying FAB element.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--fab-menu-item-direction** - The `flex-direction` of the {@link FabMenuItem} _(default: row)_
- **--fab-menu-item-justify** - The Flex `justify-content` of the {@link FabMenuItem} _(default: flex-end)_
- **--fab-menu-item-padding-end** - The logical `padding-inline-end` value _(default: 0)_
- **--fab-menu-item-padding-start** - The logical `padding-inline-start` value _(default: 0)_

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text label displayed next to the FAB item.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: The icon to display inside the FAB item.

tags.name: fab-menu
tags.description:
A floating action button that toggles a menu of actions.
---


### **Slots:**
 - **menu-items** - The content of the menu, typically {@link FabMenuItem} elements.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--fab-menu-transition-duration** - The duration of the menu's opening and closing animations. _(default: 200ms)_

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description:
The MaterialSymbol to display when the menu
is closed. Defaults to 'add'. An empty string
  suppresses the icon

attributes.name: opened-icon
attributes.description:
The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description:
The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
The label of the underlying MdFab.
Defaults to an empty string.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: The `aria-label` of the FAB.

attributes.name: direction
attributes.description: The direction in which the menu items should expand.

tags.name: app-shell
tags.description:
The core layout component for the application.
Handles theme switching, FAB configurations, and navigation slotting.
Uses Material Design 3 tokens and components.
---


### **Slots:**
 - **app-nav** - Where the {@link NavComponent} is placed
- **app-content** - The place for the dynamic application content

tags.name: nav-component
tags.description:
A navigation component that renders primary tabs synchronized with the application's URL hash routes.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--nav-component-icon-animation** - The duration of the icon's fill and color transition. _(default: 225ms)_
- **--nav-component-icon-animation-reduced** - The duration of the icon's transition when motion is reduced. _(default: 1ms)_

tags.name: profile-section
tags.description:
A reusable section component for profile-related content.
Uses container queries to provide a responsive grid layout that adapts to available space.

API
--
---

attributes.name: section-title
attributes.description:
The text shown in the section heading (`

`). Corresponds to the attribute `section-title`. Slot API -- : (required) Container for section body content. Preserves the responsive grid layout. Example: ```html
...your list, cards, or details...
```

tags.name: word-cloud
tags.description:
A component that renders a cloud of words with various sorting and grouping options.
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--word-cloud-animation** - Duration of the entrance animation for each word. _(default: 150ms)_
- **--word-cloud-animation-reduced** - Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active. _(default: 1ms)_
- **--word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight). _(default: 1.75rem)_
- **--word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the first weight quartile. _(default: 1.75rem)_
- **--word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the second weight quartile. _(default: 1.5rem)_
- **--word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the second weight quartile. _(default: 1.5rem)_
- **--word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the third weight quartile. _(default: 1.25rem)_
- **--word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the third weight quartile. _(default: 1.25rem)_
- **--word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight). _(default: 1rem)_
- **--word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile. _(default: 1rem)_

attributes.name: words
attributes.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

attributes.name: instant-clear
attributes.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

attributes.name: grouping
attributes.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

attributes.name: sorting
attributes.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

tags.name: partial-header
tags.description:
A header component used for section titles with support for primary, secondary, and tertiary Material color variants.
---

attributes.name: heading-text
attributes.description: The text to display within the header.

attributes.name: header-type
attributes.description:
The color variant theme for the header background and text.
Can be 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.

tags.name: work-experience
tags.description:
A component for displaying professional work experience entries.
Supports nesting for sub-roles or specific project assignments under a single employer.
---

attributes.name: is-nested
attributes.description: If true, adjusts font sizes and layout for a nested appearance.

attributes.name: experience-role
attributes.description: The title of the professional role or project.

attributes.name: experience-org
attributes.description: The name of the organization or client.

attributes.name: date-start
attributes.description: Start date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

attributes.name: date-end
attributes.description: End date information including machine-readable stamp and display text.

attributes.name: summaries
attributes.description: A list of summary points describing achievements or responsibilities.

attributes.name: jobs
attributes.description: A list of sub-jobs or project assignments to be rendered as nested experiences.

tags.name: configs-dialog
tags.description:
A comprehensive configuration dialog for managing application settings.
Allows users to toggle dark mode, change color themes, adjust contrast,
and customize Floating Action Button (FAB) behaviors.
---


### **Events:**
 - **fab.change** - Dispatched when a FAB's position or style is modified.
- **color_scheme.change** - Dispatched when the UI theme, mode, or contrast is changed.
- **stepUpOpen**

### **Methods:**
 - **showDialog(formContent: _FormContent_): __** - Shows the configuration dialog.
- **hideDialog(): __** - Hides the configuration dialog.

tags.name: connect-dialog
tags.description:
A dialog component that provides various contact methods and social links.
It features collapsible sections for different connection categories.
---


### **Events:**
 

### **Methods:**
 - **showDialog(): __** - Shows the connect dialog and applies a custom border to the internal container.
- **hideDialog(): __** - Maps to MdDialog's close method

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--connect-dialog-content-transition** - The animation duration for expanding/collapsing connection details. _(default: 0.3s)_

tags.name: step-up-dialog
tags.description:
A versatile confirmation dialog used to verify user intent before performing
significant actions like resetting settings.
---


### **Events:**
 - **stepUpComplete** - Dispatched when the user confirms or cancels the action.

### **Methods:**
 - **showDialog(): __** - Shows the step-up confirmation dialog.

### **Slots:**
 - **headline** - The {@link MdDialog} headline {@link slot}
- **content** - The body of the {@link MdDialog}
- **actions** - The area of dialog action buttons

attributes.name: dialogStyle
attributes.description: The visual style variant of the dialog, affecting colors and icons.

attributes.name: dialogContentString
attributes.description: The text content to display in the dialog body.
